major_failures: No FBX, OBJ, glTF, Roblox-ready asset, or export collection is produced or listed for Phase 1, so actual Roblox import behavior cannot be verified.

There is no explicit export-prep validation step that confirms transforms are applied or baked before export; the only visible mesh, WholeCell_ContextSocket_ReviewGhost, has non-default scale and must remain excluded from production export.
minor_issues: The two Phase 1 manifest components, WholeCell_ContextSocket and Golgi_RootRig, use exact stable names from component_manifest.json.

The intentionally deferred manifest components are reported in phase_01_builder_report.json: Cisterna_Stack, Cis_Face, Trans_Face, Cargo_ModificationSites, Budding_Vesicles, Dispatch_Vesicles, and Interaction_Hotspots.

Golgi_RootRig and WholeCell_ContextSocket are Blender Empty objects, which are useful for hierarchy and placement but need a defined Roblox mapping such as a Model pivot, Attachment, or metadata marker.
The review render confirms the scene contains only a translucent context ghost and no exportable Golgi cisternae, faces, vesicles, cargo markers, or hotspots yet.
Procedural noise, bump, alpha transparency, and Blender material nodes are appropriate for review materials but will need baked textures or simplified Roblox material equivalents in later phases.
Triangle count, material count, texture count, and object count are listed only as future risks rather than measured export budget values for the current scene.
required_fixes: Before any Roblox export, add an explicit export-prep path that applies or bakes transforms for every exportable mesh component.
Keep WholeCell_ContextSocket_ReviewGhost, cameras, and lights out of production exports, or place exportable objects in a dedicated export collection with exclusions documented.
Define how Golgi_RootRig and WholeCell_ContextSocket map into Roblox, including Model pivot behavior, Attachment placement, and whether the context socket is setup-only metadata.
When Phase 2 adds Cisterna_Stack geometry, record measured object count, triangle count, material count, texture count, and any LOD or simplification plan.
Continue using exact component_manifest.json names for major components and continue reporting all intentionally incomplete manifest components by phase.
Bake or replace Blender procedural material features before Roblox import validation.
